title: Lemonade Inc (LMND) Q4 2024 Earnings Call Highlights: Record Growth and Strategic Expansion
text: Lemonade Q4 2024 record growth and strategic expansion highlights. In-force premium growth: 26% year-over-year to $944 million. Customer count: 2.4 million (20% increase). Gross loss ratio: 63% (best ever; 77% in Q4 2023). Trailing 12-month loss ratio: 73% (12 points improved YoY). Adjusted free cash flow: $27 million (strongest quarter ever). Gross profit: $167 million (90% YoY growth). Revenue: $149 million (29% YoY growth). Company achieved first cash flow positive year in 2024: $48 million adjusted free cash flow, achieved year ahead of expectations. 2025 Guidance: In-force premium growth 28%, expected approach 30% cruising velocity. California wildfires: approximately $45 million gross losses, reinsurance reducing net impact to roughly $20 million. 850-900 claims filed, approximately 90% renter claims. Growth spending increase: approximately 40% year-over-year ($165 million total). EBITDA loss Q1: $46-49 million (including fire impact). Full-year EBITDA loss: $135-140 million. Profitability path: EBITDA positive by end 2025/early 2026, GAAP profitability roughly year thereafter. Auto insurance: considerable conversion rate unlocks, over 2 million on waitlist.
